contexts.context: ...turned.  It seemed preferable, and anyway became a <mark>habit</mark>, to take the cart track  through the field...
...he had carried on right through, only dropping the <mark>habit</mark> when he came to spend his summers
...    above all withstood the ordeal of LYAmerica through a <mark>habitation</mark>     of seventeen years;  he has even 'succeeded' here." And...
